failClosedPolicy: Consumers must stop on unsupported protocol version, failed handshake, missing projection, missing telemetry, missing command proposal, or missing evidence export; do not replace the typed attach protocol with method-name JSON hatches.
pinningGuidance: asha-testing and asha-studio should pin @asha/devtools by package path or ASHA public package bundle plus git commit for proof and attach artifacts until registry/version publishing exists; asha-demo should do the same when it adds human-facing live demo evidence.
